# EveryDay AI with Graham

> Practical AI consulting for Australian small and mid-sized businesses — with deep domain credibility in Western Australian civil engineering, construction, and mining services. Fixed-price packages, not hourly consulting.

EveryDay AI with Graham is the AI consulting practice of **Graham Blackwell**, a Perth-based AI consultant with **20+ years of finance and business systems experience** across Western Australian civil, construction, and mining-services firms turning over up to AUD $60 million.

Unlike most AI consultants — who come from a pure technology background — Graham is a finance and systems operator first. He implemented Procore, MYOB, Xero, ApprovalMax, and Definitiv at firms including Halo Civil Engineering and Pilbara Resource Group before moving full-time into AI. The result: recommendations grounded in how construction and mining-services businesses actually operate, not just what's technically possible.

## Core Services

- [AI Readiness Review](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/services#ai-readiness-review) — **1 week, from AUD $2,500.** A written report ranking the 5 highest-value AI opportunities in a business, scored by payback, effort, and risk. Includes discovery call, systems review, and a 90-minute walk-through.
- [AI Implementation Sprint](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/services#ai-implementation-sprint) — **4 weeks, from AUD $12,000.** Pick one workflow, we build and deploy the AI-powered replacement and train the team. Client ends the sprint with a working system, not a slide deck.
- [AI Advisor Retainer](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/services#ai-advisor-retainer) — **Ongoing, from AUD $1,500/month, 3-month minimum.** Monthly strategy call, async Q&A, one quarterly implementation included.

## Who This Is For

- **Primary ICP:** WA civil engineering, earthworks, mining-services, drilling, and specialty subcontractor SMEs turning over $10M–$100M and running Procore, InEight, Jobpac, and MYOB or Xero.
- **Secondary:** Any Australian small-to-mid business ($1M–$50M turnover) with defined workflows, finance and operations pain, and the appetite to buy fixed-price packages over open-ended consulting.
- Buyers who prefer clarity on price, timeline, and deliverables before committing.

## Differentiators

- **Operator, not technologist.** 20+ years finance-and-systems leadership at firms running Procore, MYOB, Xero, ApprovalMax, and Definitiv. AI recommendations are framed in ledger entries and workflow maps, not tokens per second.
- **WA construction and mining-services specialist.** Implemented Procore at Halo Civil Engineering ($60M turnover, AFR Top 100 fastest-growing) and Pilbara Resource Group. These are uncommon credentials in the AI-consulting market.
- **Productised packages.** Fixed price, fixed scope, fixed timeline. No open-ended engagements.
- **Built, not just talked about.** Has personally built and shipped AI systems: a multi-model 24/7 AI agent (Harry), a fully-automated YouTube production pipeline, a warehouse management system with barcode scanning, and more.

## Key Pages

- [About Graham](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/about) — career, philosophy, why "everyday AI" is the right frame.
- [Services & Pricing](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/services) — full detail on packages, FAQs, and case studies.
- [YouTube Channel](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/youtube) — EveryDayAiWithGraham: practical AI explainers aimed at older Australians and non-technical business owners.
- [Contact](https://everydayaiwithgraham.com/contact) — book a free 20-minute discovery call.

## Coverage

Based in **Perth, Western Australia**. Serves clients across Australia remotely, with optional on-site discovery and training days.
